summary: NullPointerException in NameNode when block report arrives during safemode
description:
The NameNode throws an NPE if a DataNode block report arrives while the node is still in safemode and the BlockManager is not fully initialized.
java.lang.NullPointerException
	at org.apache.hadoop.hdfs.server.namenode.BlockManager.processReport(BlockManager.java:1934)
	at org.apache.hadoop.hdfs.server.namenode.NameNodeRpcServer.blockReport(NameNodeRpcServer.java:1521)
	at org.apache.hadoop.ipc.Server$Handler.run(Server.java:2278)
resolution_note: Guarded block report handling against a null BlockManager during safemode; added a null check and a unit test.

summary: OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space during shuffle with large partitions
description:
Shuffle-heavy jobs fail with OOM when a single partition does not fit in memory.
java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space
	at org.apache.spark.util.collection.ExternalAppendOnlyMap.insert(ExternalAppendOnlyMap.scala:191)
	at org.apache.spark.shuffle.BlockStoreShuffleReader.read(BlockStoreShuffleReader.scala:104)
	at org.apache.spark.rdd.RDD.iterator(RDD.scala:337)
resolution_note: Enabled spill-to-disk for the shuffle map; fixed an accumulator leak. Tune spark.shuffle.spill.numElementsForceSpillThreshold.

summary: TimeoutException: Expiring records for topic after 30000 ms
description: Producers intermittently fail with org.apache.kafka.common.errors.TimeoutException when the broker metadata is stale during a leader election.
resolution_note: Fixed a metadata refresh deadlock; increased default request.timeout.ms and documented retries.

summary: NPE in NameNode processing block report during safemode on startup
description:
Same NullPointerException path as reported before — block report during safemode hits a null BlockManager.
java.lang.NullPointerException
	at org.apache.hadoop.hdfs.server.namenode.BlockManager.processReport(BlockManager.java:1934)
	at org.apache.hadoop.hdfs.server.namenode.NameNodeRpcServer.blockReport(NameNodeRpcServer.java:1521)
	at org.apache.hadoop.ipc.Server$Handler.run(Server.java:2278)

summary: Scheduler crashes with sqlalchemy OperationalError: server closed the connection
description:
The scheduler dies after a few hours when the Postgres connection is dropped by the server.
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/airflow/jobs/scheduler_job.py", line 1487, in _run_scheduler_loop
    self._do_scheduling(session)
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/sqlalchemy/engine/base.py", line 1802, in execute
    return connection._execute_clauseelement(elem, multiparams, params)
sqlalchemy.exc.OperationalError: (psycopg2.OperationalError) server closed the connection unexpectedly
resolution_note: Set pool_recycle and pool_pre_ping on the SQLAlchemy engine; retry on OperationalError.

summary: Task not serializable: NotSerializableException for closure capturing SparkContext
description: A map closure that references a field of the driver class captures the whole SparkContext and fails with org.apache.spark.SparkException: Task not serializable.
resolution_note: Extract the needed value into a local val (or broadcast it) so the closure does not capture SparkContext.

summary: RegionServer aborts with IOException: Too many open files
description: Under high region count the RegionServer aborts because it exhausts file descriptors while opening HFiles.
resolution_note: Fixed a file-handle leak in HFileReader; documented raising the OS ulimit.

description:
java.util.ConcurrentModificationException is thrown while iterating assigned partitions during a rebalance.
	at java.util.HashMap$HashIterator.nextNode(HashMap.java:1445)
	at org.apache.kafka.clients.consumer.internals.ConsumerCoordinator.onJoinComplete(ConsumerCoordinator.java:279)
resolution_note: Copy the assignment set before iterating; synchronize rebalance callbacks.

summary: Checkpoint expired before completing under backpressure
description: Checkpoints time out and expire when the job is under sustained backpressure, eventually failing the job.

summary: DAG import error: ModuleNotFoundError after upgrade
description:
After upgrading, DAGs that import a local plugin fail with ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'plugins'.
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/opt/airflow/dags/etl.py", line 3, in <module>
    from plugins.hooks import MyHook
ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'plugins'
resolution_note: Add the plugins directory to sys.path; document AIRFLOW__CORE__PLUGINS_FOLDER / PYTHONPATH.

summary: Improve NameNode metrics for safemode transitions
description: Add counters and timers around safemode entry/exit to aid debugging. (Not a defect — improvement.)

summary: Deadlock between BlockManager and MemoryStore under high concurrency
description: Two threads acquire the BlockManager and MemoryStore locks in opposite order, producing a deadlock during eviction under load.
resolution_note: Impose a consistent lock ordering; take the MemoryStore lock before the BlockInfo lock.
